title: heteropterys parvifolia
intro: Heteropterys parvifolia, also known as the "Cali-Mariana" or "False Santa Maria" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Heteropterys parvifolia are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing protection against certain diseases. Heteropterys parvifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
